title: Waters Introduces Xevo TQ Absolute – The Most Sensitive and Compact Benchtop Tandem Quadrupole Mass Spectrometer
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #bioanalysis--Waters introduces the Xevo TQ Absolute, the most sensitive and compact tandem quadrupole mass spectrometer in its class.

title: Here's Why Waters (WAT) is a Strong Momentum Stock
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: Waters Introduces Faster, Reliable and Automated Solution for Mass and Purity Analysis of Biomolecules
text: MILFORD, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #biologics--Waters Corporation introduces new software and analytical columns to aid biomolecule drug discovery and development.
